title: Copy-edit boundary
task: Rewrite a short release announcement so it is clearer and less repetitive.
context: The user provided the full text and only wants sharper wording.

route.path: Docs / Writing > Small rewrite > No implementation

No behavior or verification surface is changing.

public_safety.review_notes: No user-provided announcement text is included.
